title: evolvulus pohlii
intro: Evolvulus pohlii, also known as Dwarf Blue Myrtle, is a flowering plant species in the Convolvulaceae family, native to tropical America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Evolvulus pohlii is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
